author: codex

patch.value: Implemented release-ready package metadata and automation for pm-preset-open-source using the latest pm CLI 2026.5.24 and pm SDK contracts. Added local pm project tracking, CI/release workflows, pm-changelog integration, TypeScript checks, production audit gates, dry-run packaging, installability metadata, and registry metadata. Verified no private tokens or personal files are present in tracked files or reachable git history before release preparation.
Prepare pm-preset-open-source as a production-ready pm package with package-local pm tracking, generated changelog data, CI and daily release automation.
Package installs with pm install; npm release gate passes; changelog is generated from package-local pm data; tracked files and reachable git history have no secret pattern hits.

message: Record release readiness hardening for pm-preset-open-source
